title: brachiaria arizonica var. laeviglumis
intro: Brachiaria arizonica var. laeviglumis, also known as Arizona brachiaria or smooth brachiaria, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, due to its antioxidant and expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Brachiaria arizonica var. laeviglumis is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be applied topically as a salve or poultice.
